title: Grassy Solo Australian Ackee Fritters
description: A crispy and flavorful ackee fritter recipe that's perfect for a solo dinner. Made with a mother sauce base, these fritters are Jain-friendly and easy to make.
instructions: Heat the oil in a kadhai over medium heat. In a bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, paprika, and salt. In another bowl, mash the ackee and mix in the mother sauce base. Add the flour mixture to the ackee mixture and mix well. Add the chopped scallions and parsley and mix until combined. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties. Place the patties in the kadhai and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown. Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
